issues.description: DSL is missing the [Activate: Main] trigger entirely. Should use trigger:'Activated' with activationType:'Main' and activationLimit:'OncePerTurn'. Current DSL only has generic 'Activated' trigger.

Action type 'AttachDon' is incorrect. The ability GIVEs (transfers) up to 1 rested DON!! card TO the Leader, not attaches DON from hand. Should be 'GiveDon' with a condition checking the card is rested (HasRestingDon) and targeting the Leader.
Missing condition to restrict target to rested DON!! cards only. Needs condition checking HasRestingDon on the card being given.
Blocker text is completely absent from DSL. The card has a [Blocker] ability that should be a separate effect triggered 'OnAttacked' allowing this card to be rested to redirect an attack.

suggestedDsl.description: [Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)
Give up to 1 rested DON!! card to your {Land of Wano} type Leader.
